title: calcitrapoides lusitanica
intro: Calcitrapoides lusitanica, also known as the Lusitanian sticky catchfly, is a plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the digestive system and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues such as nausea and indigestion. The health benefits of Calcitrapoides lusitanica include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin irritations.
